mach1.description: mach1 — the single MCP brain. Routes ALL upstream MCP calls (GitHub, Brave Search, Memory, Fetch, Sequential Thinking, Retix Vision, etc.) through one router. All tools are namespaced as <mcp_id>__<tool_name>. Also exposes mach1_* meta-tools for MCP lifecycle management.

go-architect.description: Specialized in Go 1.22+ for the mach1 router, team-api, and mcpapiserver. Use for building transport layers, auth, and sub-process supervision.

ui-builder.description: Specialized in SvelteKit and Tauri (Rust) for the Local Hub UI and Team UI.
